mapper.sql:
WHERE boardType LIKE 'qna/%'
AND boardType LIKE CONCAT( 'qna/', #{category1}, '/%' )
AND boardType = CONCAT( 'qna/', #{category1}, '/', #{category2} )
mapper.select: SELECT boardNo, memberUid, boardType, title, content, fileId, createdAt, answer, answeredAt FROM board WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo} AND boardType LIKE 'qna/%'
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET answer = #{answer}, answeredAt = NOW() WHERE boardNo = #{boardNo} AND boardType LIKE 'qna/%'
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM board WHERE boardType LIKE 'qna/%' AND boardNo IN
#{boardNo}
